title: NHC ignites pride at Nqweba Secondary School
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"GRAAFF-REINET NEWS - The National Heritage Council’s (NHC) Nelson Mandela Ubuntu Initiative honoured Dr Robert Mangaliso Sobukwe (5 December 1924 - 27 February 1978), a leader in South Africa’s liberation struggle, on Wednesday 26 March.","html":"GRAAFF-REINET NEWS - The National Heritage Council’s (NHC) Nelson Mandela Ubuntu Initiative honoured Dr Robert Mangaliso Sobukwe (5 December 1924 - 27 February 1978), a leader in South Africa’s liberation struggle, on Wednesday 26 March."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"The occasion took place at Nqweba Secondary School, and essential supplies were handed out to the learners as well."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Human Rights Month was celebrated, as well as Sobukwe’s selfless leadership and his commitment to equality and African unity.","html":"Human Rights Month was celebrated, as well as Sobukwe’s selfless leadership and his commitment to equality and African unity."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The Nelson Mandela Ubuntu Initiative’s aim is to instil the spirit of ubuntu as part of South Africans’ living heritage.","html":"The Nelson Mandela Ubuntu Initiative’s aim is to instil the spirit of ubuntu as part of South Africans’ living heritage."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The NHC also intended to restore dignity and ignite pride in Nqweba Secondary School’s learners.","html":"The NHC also intended to restore dignity and ignite pride in Nqweba Secondary School’s learners."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The acting principal, Nonceba Gladile-Ndamane, thanked the NHC and the initiative for the donations they had made to the learners, saying that the items were essential to the learners and its community.","html":"The acting principal, Nonceba Gladile-Ndamane, thanked the NHC and the initiative for the donations they had made to the learners, saying that the items were essential to the learners and its community."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Present at the event was research manager at Freedom Park Sandile Zeka, NHC programme support officer Gugu Hlatshwayo, Amos Mulandzi of the NHC, Adoko Sobukwe-Whyte of Sobukwe Trust and Family, and Nqweba Secondary’s school governing body.","html":"Present at the event was research manager at Freedom Park Sandile Zeka, NHC programme support officer Gugu Hlatshwayo, Amos Mulandzi of the NHC, Adoko Sobukwe-Whyte of Sobukwe Trust and Family, and Nqweba Secondary’s school governing body."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Mulandzi says it is the NHC’s mandate to instil heritage in individuals and communities, believing a better society will be the result when those elements are practised.","html":"Mulandzi says it is the NHC’s mandate to instil heritage in individuals and communities, believing a better society will be the result when those elements are practised."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"He said the NHC intends to preserve and promote heritage, especially living heritage, and one of these elements is ubuntu, a tradition among African communities.","html":"He said the NHC intends to preserve and promote heritage, especially living heritage, and one of these elements is ubuntu, a tradition among African communities."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Thirty-two food parcels were donated to the impoverished learners, as well as school uniforms, shoes and sanitary towels.","html":"Thirty-two food parcels were donated to the impoverished learners, as well as school uniforms, shoes and sanitary towels."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: NHC ignites pride at Nqweba Secondary School
